detectors.description: FOMI.add_liq() (FOMI.sol#733-767) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),_initialSupply * 50 / 100,0,0,_owner,block.timestamp) (FOMI.sol#749-763)

Reentrancy in FOMI.add_liq() (FOMI.sol#733-767):
	External calls:
	- pairAddress = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (FOMI.sol#741)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(address(this),address(uniswapV2Router),_initialSupply) (FOMI.sol#745)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (FOMI.sol#931)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [FOMI.add_liq()](FOMI.sol#L733-L767):
	External calls:
	- [pairAddress = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH())](FOMI.sol#L741)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_approve(address(this),address(uniswapV2Router),_initialSupply)](FOMI.sol#L745)
		- [_allowances[owner][spender] = amount](FOMI.sol#L931)
